site.title: Wesley Borlongan – Web Developer & Designer
site.description: Aspiring full‑stack developer studying DMIT-Web Design & Development at NAIT. Passionate about UI/UX, atmospheric design, animations, and building polished, responsive web experiences.

intro.name: Wesley Borlongan
intro.summary: a web developer focused on clean UI, immersive design, and building polished, responsive experiences

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Wesley — a web developer studying at NAIT, passionate about UI/UX, animations, and building polished digital experiences.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools and technologies include:
about.passion: Outside of coding, I enjoy anime, Gunpla, event organizing, and building atmospheric UI systems. I love combining design, storytelling, and interactivity to create memorable user experiences.
about.approach: I focus on clean, maintainable code and scalable design systems. I choose tools based on the project’s needs and aim to deliver thoughtful, user‑centered solutions.

now.title: Now
now.status: Currently studying full‑time and building portfolio projects
